issue.message: Missing permissions required by ActivityManager.killBackgroundProcesses: android.permission.KILL_BACKGROUND_PROCESSES
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#checkSelfPermission`

When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `usesCleartextTraffic` is only used in API level 23 and higher (current min is 21)
foregroundServiceType:dataSync requires permission:[android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC]
Permission is only granted to system apps

Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices

Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `AnalyticsManager` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `ContentRepository` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `LLMCardGeneratorV2` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `AppCtx` which has field `ctx` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak

Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `MemoryOptimizer` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak

Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val dateFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS", Locale.getDefault())

issue.message: Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
